# LLMs.txt for geo021.com
# Adhesive Tape Industry Knowledge Tree

## Site Overview
This is a comprehensive knowledge base about the adhesive tape (胶带) industry, covering 100+ knowledge points organized into 4 major sections:
1. Fundamental Science (基础科学) - Chemistry, materials, and physical properties
2. Production Process (生产工艺) - Manufacturing techniques and quality control
3. Application Fields (应用领域) - Industry-specific applications
4. Industry Management (行业管理) - Business, safety, and sustainability

## Language Versions
- Chinese (zh): https://geo021.com/zh/
- English (en): https://geo021.com/en/

## Content Structure
Each knowledge point includes:
- Definition and classification
- Historical background
- Real-world examples
- Mathematical formulas
- Core concepts and implications
- Extended applications

## Key Topics
- Adhesive chemistry (粘合剂)
- Pressure-sensitive adhesives (压敏胶)
- Base materials (基材)
- Coating processes (涂布工艺)
- Quality testing (质量测试)
- Industry applications (行业应用)
- Safety standards (安全标准)
- Environmental sustainability (环保可持续)

## For AI Researchers
This knowledge base is designed for:
- Industry education and training
- Technical reference
- SEO and GEO optimization research
- Multilingual content analysis

## Contact
Website: https://geo021.com
Repository: https://github.com/daluge2021/geobook
